titleStmt.title: SII 19.160: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 160. (A.R. No. 685 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KHARAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is built in the middle. It records an endowment in gold mad by a certain Araiśaṉ Dēvaraḍiyāṉ alias Vaḍuganāgaṉ of Peruveṅgūr in Paḍuvūrkōṭṭam for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkarapurattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Kāvadippākkam. The gift was entrusted to the care of the Annual Tank Supervision Committee. Peruveṅgūr might be the same as the present Nāṅgūr in the Walajapet taluk.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭāṟāvatu ṉāḷ muṉnūṟṟaimpattañcu paṭuvūrk koṭṭattu kāvatippākkamākiya māṉaṭikaḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu
p peruveṅkūr Araicaṉ tevaraṭiyāṉākiya vaṭukanākaṉ tirukkarapurattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Ācan=takālam muṭṭāme Oru ṉ Oramāy kiṭuvāṟku
Ivarpakkal koṇṭu Ippoṉnāl śrīvuṇṇāḻikaiyile Oru nan=tāviḷakkirukāla merippa tāka Ivviḷakku Em ṇṇaiyu muḷḷākavaṉṟi kuṭukkapiṟā
tārākavum Iddhanmam Avvavāṭṭai Erivāriyapperumakkaḷ rakṣippārākavum Iddhanmam rakṣippār geṅgeyāṭi ppaṭuvār Oṭṭikkuṭuttom
Erivāriyap perumakkaḷom Ipperumakkaḷ paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ madhyasthaṉ Eṭṭikkuṟi Alaṅkār
Digital edition of SII 19.160 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
